violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. A wet wiping cloth was stored on the counter next to the prep cooler.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoops were stored directly on top of the ice machine and not on a cleaned and sanitized surface.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Containers of pasta salad, cooked sausage in the Walk in cooler were not dated. A bag of pepperoni in the prep cooler was dated 3/4/25. This exceeds the ten days allowed.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters in the hood system need to be cleaned.
